problem id: e98106b7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  10100101 -> 11011111
  00100000 -> 01111011
  11001100 -> 01010111
  10110010 -> 01100011
  00101011 -> 00110110
  01000011 -> 10011011
  11001101 -> 01110011
  10100011 -> 00000111
  10000000 -> 11101111
  11110011 -> 01001111

query: 01100100
predicted answer: 11100011
